description: Set up the project environment: install dependencies and verify existing tests and build pass
steps: Create a stub amplify_outputs.json at the project root if it does not exist (needed for build - just needs valid JSON with expected structure based on import in main.tsx)
Run npm run test to verify existing tests pass
Run npm run build to verify the project builds successfully
acceptance_criteria: npm run test passes all existing tests
verification: npm run test exits with code 0
npm run build exits with code 0
findings: npm install completed with peer dependency warnings (non-blocking). amplify_outputs.json is gitignored so it must be created locally for build/test but cannot be committed. Created stub with {"auth":{},"data":{},"version":"1"}. All 82 tests pass. Build succeeds (chunk size warning only). Tests produce act() warnings from Amplify UI components - pre-existing, not related to our changes.
